text: As I enter this space, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The clean, open design and reflective surfaces evoke a feeling of clarity and potential, yet the emptiness imparts a slight loneliness. Approaching the R+D exhibit, an intellectual excitement bubbles within me—here, research and innovation are tangible. The words and displays invite contemplation about the evolving interplay of humans and intelligent machines, making me feel both inspired and thoughtfully unsettled, reminded of the ever-changing boundary between self and technology.
